extDescription: Block tab close, Record Requests, Copy Mode, Translate Mode, Web Crosshair, API Tester, Zabbix PDF, Script Loader
recordHelp: 💡 Leave empty = record all domains. Or enter specific domain (e.g., example.com)
devToolsNote: 💡 Note: Please open DevTools (F12) to view requests in the Network tab.
openDevToolsDesc: to view requests in Network tab
copyModeHelp: 💡 Enable Copy Mode: Hover over text/button then click to auto copy
translateModeHelp: 💡 Enable Translate Mode: Hover/click Japanese text to translate to English/Vietnamese
webCrosshairHelp: 💡 Click anywhere on any webpage to show crosshair alignment lines
apiTesterHelp: 💡 Import cURL, edit request, view response like Postman
zabbixChartsHelp: 💡 Download all charts from the current Zabbix page
chatNotifierHelp: 💡 Show notification when new messages arrive (requires notification permission)
scriptLoaderHelp: 💡 Auto-inject JS scripts into websites by domain
runInIframesHelp: Turn off to run script only in main page
updateInstructions: Extract and overwrite old folder, then go to chrome://extensions and reload
updateCheckFailed: Cannot check. Please check your internet connection.
screenshotHelp: 💡 Drag to select a region → auto copy image to clipboard for AI
